headline: The Bull Case For EQT (EQT) Could Change Following Record Free Cash Flow And Lower Leverage – Learn Why
summary: EQT Corporation reported past first-quarter 2026 results with revenue rising to US$3.38 billion and net income to US$1.49 billion, lifting basic earnings per share from continuing operations to US$2.38. Management also highlighted record free cash flow of US$1.80 billion and reduced net debt to about US$5.70 billion, reinforcing the company’s lower-cost profile and balance sheet strength. We’ll now examine how EQT’s record free cash flow and lower leverage reshape the company’s investment...
